signals.headline: US Tariff Rate Hits 11
signals.raw:

signals.headline: Powell Describes 'Very Unusual' Economy with Tariff-Driven Goods Inflation Peaking Q1 2026, Amid Fed Rate Cut and Weaken
signals.raw:

signals.raw:
IMF Forecasts Minimal 2026 Fed Rate Cuts (3.6% to 3.4%), GDP at 2.4%, Core PCE Inflation at 2.6% Amid Tariff Drag and Energy Risks | YES | MED**
